[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 167/26
202000 UTC MAR 26
GERMAN NAV WARN 167/26

WESTERN BALTIC. NORTH OF DARSSER ORT.
SURVEY OPERATIONS BY MV 'FUGRO PIONEER', CS 'C6BH3',
WITHIN A RADIUS OF 2 NM AROUND PSN
54-36,9N 012-35,9E
RESTRICTED MANOEVRABILITY DURING OPERATIONS.
BERTH OF 1000 M REQUESTED.
